items.title: US launches airstrikes to ‘swiftly punish’ Iran for deaths of US troops
items.summary: The United States (US) said airstrikes on Sunday aimed to "punish" Iran over the first US military deaths since renewed hostilities with the Islamic republic, Bloomberg reported.

items.title: Chinese Yuan: Consolidation holds upside bias against US Dollar – UOB
items.summary: United Overseas Bank (UOB) strategists Quek Ser Leang and Lee Sue Ann note that USD/CNH is currently consolidating in a narrow range around 6.77. In their 1–3 week view, they maintain a downside bias toward 6.7600 as lon
items.title_ko: 중국 위안화: 통합으로 미국 달러에 대한 거꾸로 편향 – UOB
items.summary_ko: United Overseas Bank (UOB) 의 전략가인 Quek Ser Leang과 Lee Sue Ann은 USD/CNH가 현재 약 6.77 의 좁은 범위에서 통합되고 있다고 지적합니다. 1-3주의 관점에서, 그들은 6.7600에 대한 단점 편향을 론으로 유지합니다.
